requirementCueLines: Arts, Media & Culture majors have five tracks to choose from:

For a BA in Arts, Media & Culture, you need to complete 60 credits, which must include a minimum of 30 credits of upper-division (300–400 level) courses, as well as the UWT general education and graduation requirements totaling a minimum of 180 credits.
